title: I just tried DreamScope.io trading bots
author: Abject_Mission_4167
selftext: Hey guys, I think I stepped on a hidden gem I've tried a lot of AI bots but was never confident enough about them until now I met with the founder VIA zoom and he showed me everything they've been working on for the past 3 years and how their systems have tight equity protector as well as consistent returns ever since they started as an invite only group but they just went public and wanted to maybe help any of y'all that were looking into such sort of bots. i've been using them for over a year now and the least month I got was 1.5% profit the most was upto 14% but the consistency and knowing that the equity protecter is always there to save me just give me so much comfort and confidence in them. Check them out [DreamScope.io](https://DreamScope.io) or their instagram, facebook, tiktok. Thank me later
